svg.title: Local AI video editing automation pipeline for Dr. Deepika's videos
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full Python-based automated video editing pipeline from raw footage to final YouTube-ready video

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What video input format works best?')
sendPrompt('What can Gemma4 do for video automation?')
sendPrompt('Write me a MoviePy script for overlaying subtitles')
sendPrompt('How does FFmpeg speed up rendering?')
sendPrompt('What is the final output format for YouTube?')
sendPrompt('How do I auto-burn subtitles into video with Python?')
sendPrompt('How do I overlay a lower third banner with MoviePy?')
sendPrompt('How do I add image overlays at specific timestamps?')
sendPrompt('How do I add background music with fade in MoviePy?')
sendPrompt('How do I add animated text cards at timestamps?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a watermark logo to all videos?')
sendPrompt('How do I auto-cut silences from video with Python?')
sendPrompt('How do I generate GIF overlays on video with MoviePy?')

svg.text: Click any node to ask a follow-up question
